title: elymus zhui
intro: Elymus zhui, also known as Chinese wildrye or Zhui, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus zhui include reducing inflammation, relieving cough and fever, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Elymus zhui is often used in decoctions or teas, and it can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets for convenience.
